existing_features.title: Add Android packaging support so the web app can be built and installed as an Android APK (WebView wrapper) using a standard approach (e.g., Capacitor) that works with a React + Vite-style frontend.

Ensure Internet Identity authentication flow works from the Android APK (including any required WebView allow-list/navigation handling), and document any user steps needed to complete login on Android.

Add clear developer documentation for producing an installable APK and sharing it (debug build and optional release signing), including prerequisites, build commands, and where the APK artifact is output.

new_feature_requests.summary: Provide an Android APK build so the app can be downloaded and installed on an Android phone

projectName: Provide an Android APK build for the expense tracker
